violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. v-Due to the pizza prep station that is out f service alternative refrigerators are being used and working containers are difficult to manage an maintain food protection between uses. Until the prep table can be repaired ensure food safety by providing a cover for the containers between uses.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -The pizza prep table is out of service and this is causing a challenge in the process. Maintaining equipment is critical to ensure overall food safety. -The evaporator fans in the walk in freezer are covered by over 50% and is causing frost build up and will increase the risk of a freezer failure. Maintain to ensure proper food temperatures.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately.-Bottoms of coolers and freezers have a build up of food debris. Clean more frequently.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -The initial test results were at 0 ppm of any sanitizer. We checked to make sure the dispenser was working properly and it tested in compliance. The result was that it was ready for refreshing and it had not been changed in a while. Monitor process and adjust to maintain proper concentrations.--Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -The sanitizing compartment was dirty and had food debris in it. Food removal should have been completed in the wash and rinse section prior to the sanitizing compartment.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Handwash sink nearest the ice cream station was out of paper towels.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
